headline: What Investors Still Get Wrong About AppLovin
summary: The market still labels AppLovin a mobile gaming company, but the games are gone and what replaced them is generating margins that rival the most profitable software businesses on earth. The question is whether the valuation has caught up to the reality.

headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks on Our Buy List and 2 We Brush Off
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.

headline: Here's How Much $100 Invested In AppLovin 15 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
summary: AppLovin (NASDAQ:APP) has outperformed the market over the past 15 years by 10.85% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 23.03%. Currently, AppLovin has a market capitalization of $150.34 billion.
